name: INTELLIGENT BIO SOLUTIONS INC.
business: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. is a medical technology company that develops and delivers non-invasive, rapid testing and screening solutions, primarily the Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening System (IFP System) which analyzes fingerprint sweat to detect drugs of abuse. The IFP System is commercially available in certain countries outside the United States and is sold to safety-critical industries such as construction, transportation and logistics, mining, manufacturing, engineering, drug treatment organizations, and judicial organizations.

exposures.sentence: The Company's current active product is the Intelligent Fingerprinting Platform, which consists of the proprietary portable platform that analyzes fingerprint sweat using a one-time cartridge and portable handheld reader.

catalysts.sentence: On December 18, 2024, the Company announced the submission of its 510(k) premarket notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for clearance following FDA review of its IFP System.

catalysts.event: Completed method comparison study on IFP System
catalysts.sentence: On November 26, 2024, the Company announced the successful completion of its method comparison study on its IFP System.

catalysts.event: Granted patent in the US for drug screening cartridge
catalysts.sentence: On March 26, 2025, the Company announced it had been granted a patent in the United States (U.S.) relating to its Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening Cartridge.

catalysts.event: Integrated Latin American Spanish into IFP System
catalysts.sentence: On April 22, 2025, the Company announced the integration of Latin American Spanish into its IFP System.

catalysts.event: Distribution partnership with QabasTech in Saudi Arabia
catalysts.sentence: On July 24, 2024, the Company announced a new distribution partnership with QabasTech as its exclusive distributor in Saudi Arabia.

catalysts.event: Distribution partnership with Spirit Group in Australia
catalysts.sentence: On October 9, 2024, the Company announced a new distribution partnership with Spirit Group, an Australian, Indigenous-owned marketing and consulting agency.
On August 21, 2024, the Company announced the installation of over 1,000 Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening Readers with customers as of June 30, 2024.
On May 06, 2025, the Company announced the launch of three new localized websites in Arabic, Italian, and Spanish.

catalysts.event: Announced major upgrade plans for IFP System
catalysts.sentence: On January 31, 2025, the Company announced plans for a major upgrade to its IFP System.

tamClaims.claim: Global Point of Care diagnostics market valued at $45.36 billion in 2022, projected to reach $75.46 billion by 2027 (CAGR 10.7%).
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Point of Care/Rapid Diagnostics Market report by MarketsandMarkets, the global Point of Care (POC) diagnostics market was valued at $45.36 billion in 2022 and is projected to reach $75.46 billion by 2027, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.7%.

tamClaims.claim: Global drug screening market projected to reach $19.5 billion by 2029 (CAGR 16.6%).
tamClaims.sentence: A 2024 MarketsandMarkets report estimates the global drug screening market will reach $19.5 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 16.6%.

tamClaims.claim: Global employer and workplace drug testing market valued at $5.90 billion in 2023, projected CAGR 4.5% to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In the employer and workplace drug testing segment, Grand View Research estimates the global market size at $5.90 billion in 2023, with an expected CAGR of 4.5% from 2024 to 2030.
